title: VanilaPVP Tweaks
description: VanillaPVP Tweaks is a convenient resource pack for Minecraft Java Edition 1.21+ that makes the game cleaner and more informative: reduced on-screen fire no longer obscures visibility, enchantment books are now color-coded at a glance.
body: VanilaPVP Tweaks is a convenient resource pack for Minecraft Java Edition 1.21+ that makes the game cleaner and more informative: reduced on-screen fire no longer obscures visibility, enchantment books are now color-coded at a glance, and all tools now have color-coded material markers—no more confusing iron and diamond in a chest. A dark hotbar with updated health and food icons completes the clean and user-friendly interface.
